source_meta.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System

systems.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System
systems.system_notes: Hip fracture nailing platform within the TRIGEN family using the INTERTAN integrated compression screw construct.

trays.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System
trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials support the INTERTAN hip fracture nail with dedicated operative instrumentation.

components.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System
components.component_notes: Official materials describe the intertrochanteric antegrade nail platform for proximal femur fracture fixation.

components.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System
components.component_notes: Official materials describe the integrated lag screw as part of the hip fracture fixation construct.

components.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System
components.component_notes: Official materials describe the interlocking compression screw that maintains active compression and rotational stability.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public INTERTAN materials describe the implant construct clearly but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure or IFU pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
